headline: Dollar Tree, Victoria's Secret, Grocery Outlet, Williams-Sonoma, and National Vision Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz reduced the threat of a global energy crisis.

headline: Evaluating Dollar Tree (DLTR) After Recent Share Price Swings And A Suggested 15% Valuation Gap
summary: Dollar Tree (DLTR) has drawn investor attention after recent share price moves, with the stock up about 6% over the past week but showing a negative return over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Dollar Tree. Set against a 1 year total shareholder return of 33.85% and a 3 year total shareholder return of 29.84% in decline, the recent 6.00% 1 day share price move and weaker 90 day share price return of 24.31% in decline suggest momentum has faded in the short term.
